title: ITU COP guidelines
detail: Continental and international baseline referenced in the brief.

title: AU COP Policy adopted
detail: The African Union Child Online Safety and Empowerment Policy is the key continental policy trigger.

title: Tanzania amendments and Ghana framework
detail: Tanzania's amendments and Ghana's framework work fall inside the acceleration period.

title: Mali and Senegal DPA directives
detail: These directives show data protection authorities acting before dedicated COP laws exist.

title: Kenya guidelines and Zambia strategy
detail: Kenya and Zambia are important 2025 implementation-stage examples.

title: Gabon ordinance and rights-risk warnings
detail: Gabon and later rights-risk cases mark the next phase of the debate.
